description_long: This is a rectangular, clear plastic bottle of Fiji Water, featuring a blue screw cap and a prominent front label. The label displays the 'FIJI' brand in large white letters, with a tropical background of blue water, sky, and palm trees, and a red hibiscus flower at the bottom. The bottle's body is transparent, allowing the water inside to be visible, and the sides are faceted with flat panels. The back of the bottle has a large blue panel with a sky and palm tree motif, while the sides are mostly clear with minimal labeling. The cap is a solid blue color and appears to be made of plastic, matching the overall aesthetic of the bottle. The bottle is slender and tall, typical of single-serve bottled water found in urban environments.
description: A clear, rectangular Fiji Water bottle with a blue screw cap, tropical-themed label, and visible water inside. The front features bold branding and a red hibiscus flower.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Fiji Water label, blue cap, and red hibiscus flower prominently.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal labeling, mostly clear plastic and blue cap visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a large blue panel with sky and palm tree imagery, blue cap on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with clear plastic and blue cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with 'FIJI' in large white letters, blue background with tropical imagery, red hibiscus flower at the bottom; back panel with blue sky and palm trees. Label is rectangular, covers most of the front and back surfaces.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap, cylindrical, solid blue plastic, no visible tamper-evident ring.
attribute_transparency: Bottle is fully transparent except for the labeled areas, allowing clear view of the water inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, narrow neck with visible screw threads for the cap; no flares or ridges, simple cylindrical design.
